entries.definition:
h–d–h–d to coo, to murmur, to gently pat a baby to sleep;
hoopoe. Of this root, هُدْهُد hudhud occurs once in the Qur’an.

هُدْهُد hudhud [n.] hoopoe (27:20) وَتَفَقَّدَ الطَّيْرَ فَقَالَ مَا لِي لَا أَرَى
الْهُدْهُدَ and he inspected the birds and said, ‘How come I do not see the
hoopoe?’
